name: Hong Kong
label: CUHK / doctoral formation
summary: The strongest public anchor of the academic chapter: Ph.D. formation at The Chinese University of Hong Kong.

name: Hefei, Anhui
label: University of Science and Technology of China (USTC)
summary: Entered USTC at 16 years old. This is the opening mythic milestone for the story.

name: Irvine, California
label: Beckman Laser Institute / UC Irvine
summary: Research bridge chapter in California before the founder arc takes over.

name: Redwood City, California
label: Bloombase / Silicon Valley
summary: The company chapter and center of the enterprise-security build, now directly reinforced by Bloombase's own worldwide offices page.

name: Vancouver, Canada
label: Maple / expansion chapter
summary: A public expansion story tied to talent, cryptography, and ecosystem positioning, with the location also corroborated by Bloombase's offices page.

name: Shenzhen, China
label: Shenzhen Technology University / X-Institute
summary: Academic leadership chapter: Founding Dean of AI at SZTech (2018–2021) and co-founder of X-Institute of Shenzhen (2021–2023), running in parallel with Bloombase.

name: Global AI infrastructure
label: Conference and alliance layer
summary: The current chapter is distributed across cloud, accelerator, and security ecosystems rather than one city.
